Metadata.name: AeloKit
Metadata.title: AeloKit - Open-source AI Chat and Agent workspace kit
Metadata.description: AeloKit is an open-source full-stack kit for building self-hostable, production-ready AI chat and agent workspaces.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: AeloKit is an open-source full-stack kit for shipping self-hostable AI chat and agent workspaces with a production-ready foundation.
AboutPage.introduction: AeloKit gives builders a calm, production-ready foundation for AI chat and agent workspaces: auth, billing, credits, storage, analytics, docs, and a clear path from chat to executable tools.

HomePage.title: AeloKit
HomePage.description: Open-source full-stack kit for self-hostable AI chat and agent workspaces.

hero.title: AeloKit
hero.description: From boilerplate to production—ship your AI workspace fast.
hero.introduction: Open-source AI Chat / Agent workspace kit

logocloud.title: Designed to sit cleanly beside the tools teams already use

integration.title: Agent-ready by default
integration.subtitle: Composable model and tool surfaces
integration.description: Organize chat, tools, context, billing, and observability paths before your product logic gets tangled.

item-1.title: Model adapters
item-1.description: Keep model access replaceable so OpenAI-compatible providers can evolve without rewriting the workspace.

item-2.title: Tool execution
item-2.description: Shape tools and function calls as first-class product capabilities instead of one-off handlers.

item-3.title: Workspace UI
item-3.description: Use restrained, readable blocks for conversations, references, attachments, and account flows.

item-4.title: Developer workflow
item-4.description: Monorepo boundaries, typed config, docs, and commands are ready for commercial customization.

item-5.title: Knowledge surfaces
item-5.description: Leave room for citations, files, docs, and retrieval workflows as the product matures.

item-6.title: Runtime control
item-6.description: Credits, plans, API keys, and analytics create a foundation for cost and access control.

integration2.title: From chat to executable workspace
integration2.description: AeloKit keeps the product surface calm while the underlying code is ready for tools, agents, billing, storage, and deployment.

features.title: Product foundation
features.subtitle: The generic engineering is already handled
features.description: AeloKit packages the baseline a commercial AI workspace needs, so teams can focus on their differentiated agent behavior.

item-1.title: Production base layer
item-1.description: Authentication, account flows, dashboard structure, configuration, environment validation, and deployment conventions are in place.

item-2.title: Agent-ready organization
item-2.description: Code and UI are shaped around extensible chat, tools, context, and future evaluation or observability layers.

item-3.title: Commercial primitives
item-3.description: Plans, checkout, credits, email, newsletter, storage, notifications, and analytics remain available for real products.

item-4.title: Self-hostable path
item-4.description: The stack stays explicit and portable: Next.js, PostgreSQL, Drizzle, Better Auth, and workspace packages with clear ownership.

features2.title: OpenAI-style product feel
features2.subtitle: Calm, legible, action-oriented interfaces
features2.description: AeloKit favors whitespace, hierarchy, structured output, and responsive layouts that keep attention on the conversation and next action.

features3.title: What is included
features3.subtitle: A full-stack kit, not a blank starter
features3.description: Use the pieces as-is, replace the provider layer, or keep only the foundation your AI product needs.

item-1.title: Auth and accounts
item-1.description: Better Auth integration, profile settings, security flows, and social login wiring.

item-2.title: Database ownership
item-2.description: Drizzle schema and package boundaries that keep persistence logic out of app-level shims.

item-3.title: Billing and credits
item-3.description: Subscriptions, lifetime plans, credit packages, and transaction views for usage-based AI products.

item-4.title: Content and docs
item-4.description: Marketing pages, blog, changelog, roadmap, and documentation surfaces are already wired.

item-5.title: Config and env
item-5.description: Typed website config and shared environment validation for predictable deployment behavior.

item-6.title: Signals and operations
item-6.description: Analytics, notifications, storage, newsletter, and transactional email packages are ready to connect.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Commercial scaffolding included
pricing.description: Keep the built-in plans for your hosted product or adapt them for self-hosted distribution.

item-1.question: Is AeloKit self-hostable?
item-1.answer: Yes. It is designed around explicit infrastructure choices and environment configuration so teams can self-host or deploy to managed platforms.

item-2.question: Does it include an AI chat product?
item-2.answer: It provides the full-stack foundation and product surfaces for AI chat and agent workspaces. You can add or replace the model and tool behavior for your use case.

item-3.question: Can I use it commercially?
item-3.answer: The project is prepared as an open-source commercial foundation. Review the License section before shipping your own distribution.

item-4.question: Can I replace the model provider?
item-4.answer: Yes. AeloKit is positioned around replaceable model access and composable tool execution rather than a single hard-coded provider.

item-5.question: What should I customize first?
item-5.answer: Start with brand config, environment values, model/tool behavior, pricing, and the workspace flows that make your product specific.

testimonials.title: Built for focused AI teams
testimonials.subtitle: Use cases AeloKit is meant to support

item-1.name: Solo builders
item-1.quote: Start from a working product base instead of stitching together auth, billing, storage, and chat structure from scratch.

item-2.name: AI agencies
item-2.quote: Reuse the same reliable foundation while customizing tools, prompts, permissions, and deployment for each client.

item-3.name: Internal platform teams
item-3.quote: Give teams a coherent place to test chat, tools, files, and operational controls before committing to a larger platform.

item-4.name: Open-source maintainers
item-4.quote: Keep the architecture understandable and the product surface polished enough for contributors and adopters.

item-5.name: Product engineers
item-5.quote: Work inside clear package boundaries while keeping the application deployable, typed, and easy to inspect.

item-6.name: Founding teams
item-6.quote: Ship the workspace shell early, then iterate on the agent behavior that actually differentiates the product.

item-7.name: SaaS operators
item-7.quote: Use credits, billing, and analytics as the starting point for cost-aware AI product operations.

item-8.name: Developer tool makers
item-8.quote: Move from conversational UI toward tools and actions without rethinking the whole application shell.

item-9.name: Consultants
item-9.quote: Keep common infrastructure consistent and spend client time on domain-specific workflows.

item-10.name: AI researchers
item-10.quote: Present experiments inside a credible product frame with accounts, docs, and deployment already considered.

item-11.name: Enterprise builders
item-11.quote: The foundation leaves room for permissions, tenant boundaries, evaluation, and observability as requirements mature.

item-12.name: Design-minded teams
item-12.quote: A restrained visual language helps users focus on answers, context, citations, and action.

stats.title: Foundation metrics
stats.subtitle: A complete product base
stats.description: The kit keeps the baseline broad while leaving agent behavior open to your product.

calltoaction.title: Build the workspace, then make it yours
calltoaction.description: Use AeloKit as the calm starting point for a self-hostable AI Chat / Agent product.
